MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GIERKE, GERALD SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-23-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAR-29-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL. REPRESENTED BY NORMA MOLINAR. PL. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIPULATION- RESITUTION OF PREMISES AT 331 OCTAVIA, #5, S.F, CA. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 4-30-94 - FORF. OF LEASE/RENTAL AGREEMENT - IN CONSIDERATION OF VACATING, PL. WAIVES ALL RENT & DAMAGES, COST & ATTY FEES - IF DEF. PREPARESS PROPER LEGAL PAPERS, PL. WILL S/A & DISM. UPON DEF. VACATING. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE STIP & JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUSTIN, STACEY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 331 OCTAVIA STREET #5, SF, CA, STAYED UNTIL APR-30-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
